title: Hearts That Make You Smart!
story: National Artichoke Hearts Day happens every March 16! People celebrate by cooking with these tender, tasty vegetable hearts. Restaurants create special artichoke dishes, and families try new recipes with jarred or fresh artichoke hearts in salads, pizzas, and pasta.
activity_question: How do people typically celebrate National Artichoke Hearts Day?
activity_choices: By cooking with artichoke hearts in recipes
By growing artichoke plants in their gardens
By giving artichokes as gifts to friends
activity_answer: By cooking with artichoke hearts in recipes
bonus_fact: Artichoke hearts are actually the flower bud center of the artichoke plant!

title: Panda-monium: The Cutest Day Ever!
story: Giant pandas take over social media feeds every March 16 during National Panda Day! Zoos around the world host special panda parties with bamboo cake cutting ceremonies and educational talks about these adorable black-and-white bears. Kids wear panda costumes to school, families visit panda exhibits, and everyone shares their favorite panda videos online. Many people donate to panda conservation groups on this day to help protect these endangered animals in China. Some restaurants even serve panda-shaped cookies and green bamboo smoothies to celebrate these cuddly creatures that spend most of their day eating and napping!
activity_question: What do zoos often serve at their panda celebrations?
follow_up_question: If you could spend a day like a panda, what would you do?

title: Everything You Do Is Right Day!
story: March 16 is National Everything You Do Is Right Day, when everyone gets to feel like a champion! On this special day, people celebrate by being extra kind to themselves and others. Kids might give themselves high-fives for finishing homework, parents might pat themselves on the back for making dinner, and friends cheer each other on for small wins. Some families make it a tradition to only say positive things all day long. Social media fills up with people sharing their proud moments and encouraging posts. It's like having your own personal cheerleader squad for 24 hours straight!
activity_question: What do people fill social media with on this holiday?
follow_up_question: What small thing did you do today that you're proud of?

title: Pucker Up for Lips Appreciation Day!
story: Your lips work harder than you think, and March 16 is the perfect day to celebrate them! On National Lips Appreciation Day, people show love for these amazing body parts that help us talk, eat, smile, and even whistle. Some folks pamper their lips with special balms or glosses, while others practice fun lip tricks like rolling their tongue or making silly faces in the mirror. Social media fills up with lip selfies and facts about how lips are one of the most sensitive parts of our body.
activity_question: According to the story, what are some things our lips help us do?
bonus_fact: Your lips don't have oil glands, which is why they can get dry so easily!
